_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish and collect metrics to monitor and validate AI workforce readiness.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-T-005 (RM, cosine: 0.635), AI-S-018 (AI, cosine: 0.631).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 7.0/10 (raw 0.695). Shared vocabulary: [ai, workforce]. DCWF-only terms [collect, establish, metrics, monitor, readiness, validate] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, analysis, assessment, conduct, current, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.886 (P=0.905, R=0.868). P exceeds R by 0.038 — the DCWF element's 11 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Establish and collect metrics to monitor and validate AI workforce readiness." and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.638 < STS 0.695 (gap -0.057). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [collect, establish, metrics] and [acquisition, analysis, assessment] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.7%. Shared tokens: [ai, workforce]. DCWF-only: [collect, establish, metrics, monitor, readiness, validate]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, analysis, assessment, conduct, current, data].
